    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    S

    SacrificeHero(Player, int) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.GameplayUtils
    Forces a player to choose and sacrifice (destroy) a specified number of heroes from their board.
    SEE_MORE_BUTTON - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    SEE_MORE_BUTTON_HOVER - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    selectCardsInHand(Player) - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameChoice
    Prompts the player to select a card from their hand.
    selectHeroCard(Player) - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameChoice
    Prompts the player to select one of their currently owned Hero Cards on the board.
    selectModifierCard(Player, Player) - Static method in class gui.ModifierView
    Prompts the acting player to select a Modifier card from their hand to apply to a target's roll.
    selectModifierEffect(ModifierCard) - Static method in class gui.ModifierView
    Prompts the player to choose whether to use the positive or negative effect of a specific Modifier card.
    selectObjective() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameChoice
    Prompts the player to select an available objective from the board.
    selectPlayer(Player[]) - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameChoice
    Prompts the user to select a target player from the game.
    SerratedDirk - Class in nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass
    Represents the "Serrated Dirk" Item Card.
    SerratedDirk() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass.SerratedDirk
    Constructs a new Serrated Dirk with its identity, effect text, and target class.

    Sets the unit class of this leader.

    Sets or updates the unit class of the entity.
    Shaco - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Assassin
    Represents the "Shaco" Hero Card.
    Shaco() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Assassin.Shaco
    Constructs Shaco with his base stats and deceptive flavor text.
    ShapedStone - Class in nongui.listofcards.modifiercard
    Represents the "Shaped Stone" Modifier Card.
    ShapedStone() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.modifiercard.ShapedStone
    Constructs a new Shaped Stone card with its identity and modifier values.
    show() - Method in class gui.card.FullCardView
    Creates and shows a new Stage (window) displaying the card's details.
    show() - Method in class gui.DeckView
    Displays the deck window to the user.
    showAbilityRoll(int, int, String, int, int) - Static method in class gui.DiceView
    Displays an ability check roll animation, including target score and success/failure status.
    showDiceRoll(int, int) - Static method in class gui.DiceView
    Legacy support for rolls without a breakdown string.
    showDiceRoll(int, int, String) - Static method in class gui.DiceView
    Displays a standard dice roll animation and shows the final calculation.
    showMessage(String) - Static method in class gui.board.StatusBar
    Appends a new message to the status bar globally.
    showOverlay(StackPane) - Static method in class gui.BoardView
    Displays a temporary overlay (e.g., DiceRoll, Card Selection) over the central field.
    showResult(boolean, String, String) - Static method in class gui.ChallengeView
    Updates the challenge result label with the outcome.
    shuffle() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Deck
    Shuffles the main game deck randomly.
    shuffle() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.ObjectiveDeck
    Shuffles the objective deck randomly.
    Soraka - Class in nongui.listofleader
    Represents "Soraka" Leader Card.
    Soraka() - Constructor for class nongui.listofleader.Soraka
    Constructs a new Soraka Leader Card with Support class and hero activation bonus.
    start(Stage) - Method in class gui.GameUI
    Initializes and displays the primary stage and main game board.
    StatusBar - Class in gui.board
    Represents the status/log bar at the bottom of the game UI.
    StatusBar() - Constructor for class gui.board.StatusBar
    Constructs the global StatusBar.
    Support - Enum constant in enum class nongui.baseentity.properties.UnitClass
    A utility class focused on healing, buffing allies, or disrupting enemies.
